id.description: Unique product identifier used in URLs. Use lowercase kebab-case.

categoryId.description: Must match an id in data/categories.json.

vendorId.description: Must match an id in data/vendors.json.

image.description: Public URL (https://...) or local path starting with /.

fullDescription.description: Optional; defaults to summary if omitted.

specs.description: Product specification table as key/value pairs.

recommendedUseCases.description: Optional; list of ideal usage scenarios.

notRecommendedFor.description: Optional; list of poor fit scenarios.

warranty.description: Optional; defaults to a generic message if omitted.

availabilityNotes.description: Optional; defaults to a generic message if omitted.

optionalUpgrades.description: Optional; defaults to an empty array if omitted.

status.description: Optional; retired products are hidden from the catalogue.
